requirement_topic.en: EMC — UzStandard Certificate of Conformity (Sertifikat Sootvetstviya) for Electromagnetic Compatibility
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——UzStandard合格证书（Sertifikat Sootvetstviya）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——UzStandard合格證書（Sertifikat Sootvetstviya）

summary.en: Wireless and IoT devices sold in Uzbekistan must obtain a Certificate of Conformity (Sertifikat Sootvetstviya) from an accredited certification body recognised by UzStandard / Gosstandart (Agency for Technical Regulation, Standardization and Metrology of the Republic of Uzbekistan). For EMC, applicable standards are O'z DSt standards — many of which adopt or align closely with GOST-R and IEC CISPR standards — covering conducted and radiated emissions, immunity to electrical disturbance, and radio interference. Certification is compulsory and must be completed before the product is placed on the Uzbekistan market. Uzbekistan is not an EAEU member; the EAEU technical regulation TR CU 020/2011 (EMC) and EAC marking are not applicable. A separate Uzbek Certificate of Conformity is required.
summary.zh: 在乌兹别克斯坦销售的无线及物联网设备，须从UzStandard / Gosstandart（乌兹别克斯坦共和国技术法规、标准化与计量机构）认可的认证机构取得合格证书（Sertifikat Sootvetstviya）。电磁兼容方面，适用标准为O'z DSt标准（多数采用或对齐GOST-R及IEC CISPR标准），涵盖传导及辐射发射、抗电气干扰及无线电干扰。认证为强制要求，须在产品投放乌兹别克斯坦市场前完成。乌兹别克斯坦非EAEU成员，EAEU技术法规TR CU 020/2011（电磁兼容）及EAC标志不适用；须单独取得乌兹别克合格证书。
summary.zht: 在烏茲別克銷售的無線及物聯網設備，須從UzStandard / Gosstandart（烏茲別克共和國技術法規、標準化與計量機構）認可的認證機構取得合格證書（Sertifikat Sootvetstviya）。電磁相容方面，適用標準為O'z DSt標準（多數採用或對齊GOST-R及IEC CISPR標準），涵蓋傳導及輻射發射、抗電氣干擾及無線電干擾。認證為強制要求，須在產品投放烏茲別克市場前完成。烏茲別克非EAEU成員，EAEU技術法規TR CU 020/2011（電磁相容）及EAC標誌不適用；須單獨取得烏茲別克合格證書。

standards_or_laws: UzStandard / Gosstandart — Agency for Technical Regulation, Standardization and Metrology of the Republic of Uzbekistan — issues and oversees Certificates of Conformity
O'z DSt standards series — Uzbek state standards for EMC, aligned with GOST-R and IEC CISPR series
IEC CISPR 32 — Multimedia equipment — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics (as adopted/referenced in O'z DSt)
IEC CISPR 35 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Immunity requirements (as adopted/referenced in O'z DSt)

summary.en: Chinese wireless and IoT devices must comply with GB/T 9254 and related EMC standards enforced under the CCC (China Compulsory Certification) scheme administered by CNCA and tested by accredited laboratories. EMC for wireless devices is also covered under SRRC type approval. CCC and Chinese EMC test reports are not recognised by UzStandard and cannot substitute for a Uzbek Certificate of Conformity. Chinese test data generated to GB standards may be referenced in a UzStandard submission but full re-testing by a UzStandard-accredited laboratory is typically required to issue the Sertifikat Sootvetstviya.
summary.zh: 中国无线及物联网设备须符合GB/T 9254及相关电磁兼容标准，由国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）主管的CCC（中国强制认证）体系负责执行，并经认可实验室检测。无线设备电磁兼容亦包含在SRRC型号核准范围内。CCC认证及中国电磁兼容测试报告不被UzStandard承认，不可替代乌兹别克合格证书。依据GB标准产生的中国测试数据可在UzStandard申请中被参考，但通常仍需经UzStandard认可实验室重新检测方可颁发Sertifikat Sootvetstviya。
summary.zht: 中國無線及物聯網設備須符合GB/T 9254及相關電磁相容標準，由國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）主管的CCC（中國強制認證）體系負責執行，並經認可實驗室檢測。無線設備電磁相容亦包含在SRRC型號核准範圍內。CCC認證及中國電磁相容測試報告不被UzStandard承認，不可替代烏茲別克合格證書。依據GB標準產生的中國測試數據可在UzStandard申請中被參考，但通常仍需經UzStandard認可實驗室重新檢測方可頒發Sertifikat Sootvetstviya。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 — Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement (Chinese EMC standard)
CCC — China Compulsory Certification scheme — mandatory EMC and safety certification for products sold in China
SRRC Radio Type Approval — covers EMC aspects of radio transmission equipment under MIIT regulation

gap.en: Chinese CCC and SRRC EMC certifications are not recognised by UzStandard and do not substitute for a Uzbek Certificate of Conformity. A separate Sertifikat Sootvetstviya from a UzStandard-accredited body is mandatory before sale. The EAC mark under TR CU 020/2011 is also not valid in Uzbekistan as it is not an EAEU member. Exporters must budget time and cost for UzStandard certification, which typically takes 4–8 weeks and requires testing at an accredited Uzbek or mutually recognised laboratory.
gap.zh: 中国CCC和SRRC电磁兼容认证不被UzStandard承认，不可替代乌兹别克合格证书。须在销售前从UzStandard认可机构另行取得Sertifikat Sootvetstviya。TR CU 020/2011下的EAC标志在乌兹别克斯坦亦无效，因其非EAEU成员。出口商须预留UzStandard认证的时间和费用，通常需4至8周，并须在认可的乌兹别克或相互认可实验室进行检测。
gap.zht: 中國CCC和SRRC電磁相容認證不被UzStandard承認，不可替代烏茲別克合格證書。須在銷售前從UzStandard認可機構另行取得Sertifikat Sootvetstviya。TR CU 020/2011下的EAC標誌在烏茲別克亦無效，因其非EAEU成員。出口商須預留UzStandard認證的時間和費用，通常需4至8週，並須在認可的烏茲別克或相互認可實驗室進行檢測。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UzStandard Certificate of Conformity (Sertifikat Sootvetstviya) required for EMC before sale in Uzbekistan; EAC mark not applicable (Uzbekistan not in EAEU)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification covering EMC required before sale in China; SRRC type approval covers radio EMC aspects

source.publisher: UzStandard / Gosstandart — Agency for Technical Regulation, Standardization and Metrology of the Republic of Uzbekistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A UzStandard Certificate of Conformity (Sertifikat Sootvetstviya) is mandatory for EMC compliance of wireless devices sold in Uzbekistan. Chinese CCC or SRRC certifications do not substitute. The EAC mark (TR CU 020/2011) is not valid — Uzbekistan is not in the EAEU. Re-testing at a UzStandard-accredited laboratory is typically required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UzStandard合格证书（Sertifikat Sootvetstviya）是乌兹别克斯坦销售无线设备电磁兼容合规的强制要求。中国CCC或SRRC认证不可替代。EAC标志（TR CU 020/2011）无效——乌兹别克斯坦非EAEU成员。通常须在UzStandard认可实验室重新检测。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UzStandard合格證書（Sertifikat Sootvetstviya）是烏茲別克銷售無線設備電磁相容合規的強制要求。中國CCC或SRRC認證不可替代。EAC標誌（TR CU 020/2011）無效——烏茲別克非EAEU成員。通常須在UzStandard認可實驗室重新檢測。

requirement_topic.en: O'z DSt Conformity Certificate — Radio Equipment Immunity and Interference Standards
requirement_topic.zh: O'z DSt合格证书——无线电设备抗扰度及干扰标准
requirement_topic.zht: O'z DSt合格證書——無線電設備抗擾度及干擾標準

summary.en: In addition to the primary EMC Certificate of Conformity, radio and wireless devices in Uzbekistan must comply with applicable O'z DSt standards for radio frequency immunity and interference mitigation. These standards govern immunity to external electromagnetic fields, electrostatic discharge (ESD), fast transients, and surge immunity, and are applied through the UzStandard conformity certification process. O'z DSt standards in this area broadly align with IEC 61000 series (electromagnetic compatibility — immunity requirements) as adopted or adapted under Uzbek national standardization. Products must demonstrate compliance with all applicable immunity levels before the Sertifikat Sootvetstviya can be issued. For category-specific products (medical, industrial, residential environments), additional immunity levels may apply.
summary.zh: 除主要电磁兼容合格证书外，乌兹别克斯坦无线电及无线设备还须符合O'z DSt无线电频率抗扰度及干扰控制相关标准。这些标准规范了对外部电磁场、静电放电（ESD）、快速瞬变及浪涌抗扰度的要求，并通过UzStandard合格认证程序加以落实。该领域的O'z DSt标准与乌兹别克国家标准化采用或改编的IEC 61000系列（电磁兼容——抗扰度要求）大体对齐。产品须在颁发Sertifikat Sootvetstviya前证明符合所有适用抗扰度等级。特定类别产品（医疗、工业、住宅环境）可能须满足更高抗扰度要求。
summary.zht: 除主要電磁相容合格證書外，烏茲別克無線電及無線設備還須符合O'z DSt無線電頻率抗擾度及干擾控制相關標準。這些標準規範了對外部電磁場、靜電放電（ESD）、快速瞬變及浪湧抗擾度的要求，並通過UzStandard合格認證程序加以落實。該領域的O'z DSt標準與烏茲別克國家標準化採用或改編的IEC 61000系列（電磁相容——抗擾度要求）大體對齊。產品須在頒發Sertifikat Sootvetstviya前證明符合所有適用抗擾度等級。特定類別產品（醫療、工業、住宅環境）可能須滿足更高抗擾度要求。

standards_or_laws: O'z DSt series — Uzbek state standards for electromagnetic immunity, aligned with IEC 61000-4 series
IEC 61000-4-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Testing and measurement techniques — Electrostatic discharge immunity test
IEC 61000-4-4 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Testing and measurement techniques — Electrical fast transient/burst immunity test
IEC 61000-4-5 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Testing and measurement techniques — Surge immunity test
UzStandard / Gosstandart — certification authority for O'z DSt conformity in Uzbekistan

summary.en: In China, immunity requirements for wireless and electronic products are covered under the CCC certification scheme, with applicable GB/T standards (including GB/T 17626 series, which adopts IEC 61000-4 immunity test methods) tested by CNCA-accredited laboratories. Chinese CCC certification addressing immunity is not recognised by UzStandard. The IEC 61000-4 test methods used in China align conceptually with those referenced in O'z DSt, but a fresh certification by a UzStandard-accredited body is required for Uzbekistan market access.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线及电子产品的抗扰度要求在CCC认证体系下予以覆盖，采用适用的GB/T标准（包括采纳IEC 61000-4抗扰度测试方法的GB/T 17626系列），并由CNCA认可实验室进行测试。涵盖抗扰度的中国CCC认证不被UzStandard承认。中国采用的IEC 61000-4测试方法与O'z DSt所参考的方法在概念上对齐，但进入乌兹别克斯坦市场仍须由UzStandard认可机构重新认证。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線及電子產品的抗擾度要求在CCC認證體系下予以覆蓋，採用適用的GB/T標準（包括採納IEC 61000-4抗擾度測試方法的GB/T 17626系列），並由CNCA認可實驗室進行測試。涵蓋抗擾度的中國CCC認證不被UzStandard承認。中國採用的IEC 61000-4測試方法與O'z DSt所參考的方法在概念上對齊，但進入烏茲別克市場仍須由UzStandard認可機構重新認證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17626 series — Chinese standard series for electromagnetic immunity testing (adopts IEC 61000-4 test methods)
CCC — China Compulsory Certification — covers immunity requirements for applicable product categories in China
CNCA — Certification and Accreditation Administration of the People's Republic of China — administers CCC scheme

gap.en: Chinese CCC immunity certifications and GB/T 17626 test reports are not accepted by UzStandard for the purpose of issuing a Sertifikat Sootvetstviya. Although the underlying IEC 61000-4 test methods are shared, a fresh test campaign at a UzStandard-accredited laboratory is required. Exporters shipping into Uzbekistan's growing Chinese-device corridor (supported by Belt and Road infrastructure investment) should plan for immunity retesting as part of the overall Uzbek certification timeline.
gap.zh: 中国CCC抗扰度认证及GB/T 17626测试报告不被UzStandard接受，不能用于颁发Sertifikat Sootvetstviya。尽管底层IEC 61000-4测试方法相同，仍须在UzStandard认可实验室重新测试。向乌兹别克斯坦不断扩大的中国设备市场（受「一带一路」基础设施投资支撑）出口的商家，应将抗扰度重新测试纳入整体乌兹别克认证时间表的规划中。
gap.zht: 中國CCC抗擾度認證及GB/T 17626測試報告不被UzStandard接受，不能用於頒發Sertifikat Sootvetstviya。儘管底層IEC 61000-4測試方法相同，仍須在UzStandard認可實驗室重新測試。向烏茲別克不斷擴大的中國設備市場（受「一帶一路」基礎設施投資支撐）出口的商家，應將抗擾度重新測試納入整體烏茲別克認證時間表的規劃中。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — O'z DSt immunity compliance required as part of UzStandard Certificate of Conformity; covered within the Sertifikat Sootvetstviya process
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 17626 series immunity testing required as part of CCC certification for applicable product categories in China

source.publisher: UzStandard / Gosstandart — Agency for Technical Regulation, Standardization and Metrology of the Republic of Uzbekistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] O'z DSt immunity compliance is mandatory as part of the UzStandard Sertifikat Sootvetstviya for wireless devices sold in Uzbekistan. Chinese CCC immunity test reports are not accepted. Re-testing at a UzStandard-accredited laboratory is required. The EAC mark under TR CU 020/2011 does not apply — Uzbekistan is not in the EAEU.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] O'z DSt抗扰度合规是乌兹别克斯坦销售无线设备所需UzStandard Sertifikat Sootvetstviya的强制组成部分。中国CCC抗扰度测试报告不被接受。须在UzStandard认可实验室重新检测。TR CU 020/2011下的EAC标志不适用——乌兹别克斯坦非EAEU成员。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] O'z DSt抗擾度合規是烏茲別克銷售無線設備所需UzStandard Sertifikat Sootvetstviya的強制組成部分。中國CCC抗擾度測試報告不被接受。須在UzStandard認可實驗室重新檢測。TR CU 020/2011下的EAC標誌不適用——烏茲別克非EAEU成員。
